isFeelessFor(address,uint256,address).details: The static admin-set mappings are caller-agnostic and always apply. The hook (if set) receives `caller` (typically the terminal's `_msgSender()`) and may use it to narrow its grant — e.g. grant an ecosystem router feeless cash-outs only when the router itself is the caller, not when it appears as a split recipient of someone else's payout. Hook is invoked via try/catch — a reverting hook is treated as `false`.

params.caller: The outer caller (typically the terminal's `_msgSender()`). Pass `address(0)` for lookups without caller context.
params.projectId: The ID of the project to check.

returns._0: A flag indicating whether the address is feeless.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setFeelessAddress(address,bool).details: Equivalent to `setFeelessAddressFor(0, addr, flag)`. Can only be called by this contract's owner (typically the protocol multisig).

params.addr: The address to set as feeless or not feeless.
params.flag: Whether the address should be feeless (`true`) or not feeless (`false`).

setFeelessAddressFor(uint256,address,boo.details: Can only be called by this contract's owner (typically the protocol multisig). Use `projectId = 0` to set the global (all-project) feeless status.

params.addr: The address to set as feeless or not feeless for the project.
params.flag: Whether the address should be feeless for the project (`true`) or not (`false`).
params.projectId: The ID of the project. 0 means all projects.

setFeelessHook(address).details: Can only be called by this contract's owner (typically the protocol multisig). If `hook` is non-zero, it must report ERC-165 support for `IJBFeelessHook` or this call reverts.

params.hook: The new hook. Pass `address(0)` to disable hook consultation.

params.interfaceId: The ID of the interface to check for adherence to.

returns._0: A flag indicating if the provided interface ID is supported.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

feelessHook().notice: Optional hook consulted (in addition to the static mappings) when computing feeless status.

isFeelessFor(address,uint256,address).notice: Returns whether the specified address is feeless for a specific project, providing the outer caller of the fee-bearing operation so hooks can scope grants by who initiated the action.

setFeelessAddress(address,bool).notice: Add or remove an address from the global (all-project) fee-exempt list.

setFeelessAddressFor(uint256,address,boo.notice: Add or remove an address from a project's fee-exempt list.

setFeelessHook(address).notice: Sets (or clears) the feeless hook consulted by `isFeelessFor`.

supportsInterface(bytes4).notice: Indicates whether this contract adheres to the specified interface.

contractNotice: A registry of addresses exempt from the protocol's 2.5% fee. Feeless addresses don't incur fees on payouts they receive, surplus allowance they use, or cash outs where they are the beneficiary.
